title: ChargePoint Holdings Inc Stock Quote and Analysis - Morningstar
text: Morningstar analysis of ChargePoint Holdings Inc stock. ChargePoint is a leader in EV charging infrastructure with a large installed base and strong market position in North America. The company is executing a transformation toward a profitable business model focused on recurring subscription revenue. Key risks include competitive pressures from larger players, regulatory changes affecting EV adoption, and execution risks on product launches and partnerships. Morningstar's analysis tracks the company's progress toward profitability and monitors key metrics including subscription revenue growth, gross margin expansion, and cash burn reduction.
